name: Io
description: Beep Boop Link Io, the Wisp Io is everywhere, and in all things.

abilities.name: Equilibrium
abilities.description: Grants a greater outgoing damage amplification the closer Io is to full health. Additionally grants a greater health restore amplification and heal amplification the closer Io is to zero health.

abilities.name: Tether
abilities.description: Grants bonus movement speed to both Io and the tethered-ally while active. Whenever Io restores health or mana, the tethered-ally gains a bonus portion of the restoration. The link between Io and the affected allied unit applies a brief slow to enemy units coming in contact.

abilities.name: Spirits
abilities.description: The particles' damage is less effective on creeps, but they do not explode upon collision. Replaces by both and upon cast. These 3 abilities share a single ability slot. Right-click toggles between both sub-abilities.

abilities.name: Overcharge
abilities.description: Grants self max health as bonus health regeneration, attack speed bonus, and outgoing spell damage amplification. Grants the tethered allied unit all Overcharges' ability effects as well.

abilities.name: Relocate
abilities.description: Teleports Io to any location globally. Upon the duration expires, Io will return to the original ability cast location. Teleports the tethered allied unit alongside with Io. Upon the duration expiring, Io and the tethered allied unit will return to the original ability cast location.
